response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 19 years of engineering experience across full-stack, cloud, and infrastructure domains, plus current involvement in AI-agent infrastructure. However, AI expertise appears infrastructure-focused rather than strategic, lacking demonstrated products or platforms built with AI as the core focus. Missing advanced degree in AI/ML and limited evidence of the director-level strategic leadership and customer advisory capabilities expected for this Principal role.
strengths: 19 years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, cloud, and infrastructure—demonstrates technical breadth needed to understand complex AI/cloud ecosystems
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, showing recent AI exposure and hands-on ability to work with emerging AI technologies
Proven ability to independently build and maintain technical platforms (GISCollective founder, open-source libraries) and teach others (multiple workshops and conference talks)
concerns: AI expertise is recent and infrastructure-focused; no evidence of building AI-powered products, formulating AI strategy, or recognized expertise in AI that would justify 'Specialized Software (AI Strategy)' principal role
No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field, and career shows frequent job changes (mostly 1–3 years) without deep tenure in director-level strategic positions

Limited evidence of the strategic influence and customer-advisory capabilities expected at director level—experience centers on individual engineering contribution rather than organizational AI strategy
